raw_consumer_statement:
As of the morning of XX/XX/year>, around XXXX XXXX my personal cell phone was hacked through XXXX. After that, I lost access to all my email accounts. 
Immediately, I started receiving multiple text messages and emails notifying me that someone was attempting to gain access to my emails, bank accounts, and other sites. I also received multiple messages saying that someone was trying to send money out through my accounts and charges on my credit cards.
